title: rubus × collium
intro: Rubus × collium, also known as a hybrid raspberry or bramble, is a cross between the Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus species, resulting in a vigorous and adaptable shrub. The medicinal properties of Rubus × collium include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which can be attributed to its rich concentration of vitamins C and E, as well as its phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × collium include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, making it a valuable addition to a balanced diet. Rubus × collium can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
